scope_note: No public system found so far has the same target as SkillRecon's clause-scope documentation-to-code reconciliation with cross-file witnesses. These baselines are the closest public paper/system methods with runnable code.

baselines.name: SkillFortify
baselines.method_reference: Formal Analysis and Supply Chain Security for Agentic AI Skills (arXiv:2603.00195)
baselines.single_case_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_external_baselines.py --scanner baseline_skillfortify --skill-id youtube-summary --skill-path data/skill_dataset/youtube-summary --output-dir derived/external_baselines_smoke
baselines.full_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_external_baselines.py --scanner baseline_skillfortify --paper-dataset data/evaluation/skill_paper500_dataset --data-root data/skill_dataset --drive-map E=/mnt/e --output-dir derived/external_baselines
baselines.fit_to_skillrecon: Closest formal capability/supply-chain baseline, but it does not model SkillRecon's clause-level scope reconciliation or replayable witnesses.

baselines.name: Cisco Skill Scanner
baselines.method_reference: AI Agent Skill security scanner with static, behavioral, and optional LLM analyzers
baselines.single_case_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_external_baselines.py --scanner baseline_cisco_skill_scanner --skill-id youtube-summary --skill-path data/skill_dataset/youtube-summary --output-dir derived/external_baselines_smoke
baselines.full_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_external_baselines.py --scanner baseline_cisco_skill_scanner --paper-dataset data/evaluation/skill_paper500_dataset --data-root data/skill_dataset --drive-map E=/mnt/e --output-dir derived/external_baselines
baselines.fit_to_skillrecon: Strong security-scanner baseline for prompt injection, exfiltration, malicious code, and behavioral dataflow; not a dedicated documentation authorization checker.

baselines.name: SkillSpector
baselines.method_reference: Agent Skills in the Wild scanner implementation and vulnerability taxonomy
baselines.install: Clone and install SkillSpector with Python 3.12+, or use its Docker image.
baselines.single_case_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_external_baselines.py --scanner baseline_skillspector --skill-id youtube-summary --skill-path data/skill_dataset/youtube-summary --output-dir derived/external_baselines_smoke
baselines.full_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_external_baselines.py --scanner baseline_skillspector --paper-dataset data/evaluation/skill_paper500_dataset --data-root data/skill_dataset --drive-map E=/mnt/e --output-dir derived/external_baselines
baselines.fit_to_skillrecon: Relevant static vulnerability and agent-skill taxonomy baseline; Python 3.12+ can make it optional in older environments.

baselines.name: Snyk Agent Scan
baselines.method_reference: Snyk AI agent, MCP, and skill security scanner
baselines.install: uvx snyk-agent-scan@latest scan --json --skills <skill-path>; requires SNYK_TOKEN for normal operation.
baselines.single_case_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_external_baselines.py --scanner baseline_snyk_agent_scan --skill-id youtube-summary --skill-path data/skill_dataset/youtube-summary --output-dir derived/external_baselines_smoke
baselines.full_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_external_baselines.py --scanner baseline_snyk_agent_scan --paper-dataset data/evaluation/skill_paper500_dataset --data-root data/skill_dataset --drive-map E=/mnt/e --output-dir derived/external_baselines
baselines.fit_to_skillrecon: Optional product baseline because credentialed cloud access is not suitable as a mandatory artifact smoke dependency.
